name: ajq
description: Route JSON and NDJSON semantic filtering and bounded classification tasks to ajq safely.

interface.shortDescription: Safe semantic jq workflows for JSON and NDJSON.
interface.longDescription: Routes semantic JSON filtering and bounded classification to ajq while preserving explicit backends, deterministic jq paths, and finite cost caps.
defaultPrompt: Use ajq to safely filter this JSON by meaning.
Classify these JSON lines with ajq and bounded labels.
Plan this ajq semantic query before running a model.
